productName: Seattle Bubble Works-Flower Joint - Super Boof (H) - 0.5g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Super Boof and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
